headline: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston to step down after 19 years at helm of cloud storage pioneer
summary: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston, who started the cloud storage company when he was 24, plans to step down and assume the role of executive chairman.

headline: Booking Holdings vs. Airbnb: What Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors
summary: Quarterly filings reveal how each platform navigates travel’s off-peak slumps and peak surges, with margins and partnerships shaping the competitive landscape.
